submitted_payload.suggested_entry: - [Ralph Workflow](https://codeberg.org/RalphWorkflow/Ralph-Workflow) — Ralph Workflow is the operating system for autonomous coding: a free and open-source composable loop framework and AI orchestrator. It keeps a simple Ralph-loop core, ships with a strong default workflow for writing software, and lets teams use that default or build their own workflows on top.

why_this_action: Shared artifacts still show distribution_and_message_to_primary_repo_conversion as the live bottleneck, Apollo is already inside its measurement window until 2026-05-30, Reddit remains structurally blocked, and zhu1090093659/spec_driven_develop was a prepared but untouched curator target with unusually strong fit to Ralph Workflow's structured, spec-led positioning. Public GitHub commit metadata exposed a legitimate contact email, so direct curator outreach was the strongest same-run write path available.
